tagline: Create apps and websites by chatting with AI
subheadline: Ask Lovable to create a landing page for my... [prompt input placeholder]
value_proposition: An AI app builder that lets anyone create, iterate, and deploy working apps and websites through natural language chat.
target_audience: Non-technical builders — founders, product managers, designers, marketers, sales, ops — who want to ship products without writing code

logos: Not extractable from text — referenced as 'teams from top companies'
metrics: Millions of projects built on Lovable
Thousands of projects built per day
Millions of visits per day to Lovable-built applications

pricing.price_anchoring: No explicit pricing shown on homepage; student discount and enterprise options suggest broad market coverage

features: Describe your app or drop in screenshots/docs to start
Template library for common app types
differentiators: AI App Builder framed around 'vibe coding' — natural language as the primary interface
Broad persona targeting (founders through ops/people roles)
trust_signals: Security page linked in nav and footer

design_patterns.layout: Centered hero with prompt input, followed by social proof band, three-step how-it-works section, template showcase, and animated metrics section
design_patterns.color_scheme: Likely dark/gradient with accent color based on 'Lovable' branding — cannot fully confirm from text
design_patterns.typography: Clean, modern sans-serif — product-focused minimal style
notable_patterns: Interactive prompt input as hero CTA — makes the product itself the conversion mechanism
Animated counter metrics (started at 0 in text capture)
Template grid for inspiration and discovery
Mobile app callout ('Try the Lovable mobile app')

emotional_tone: Aspirational and accessible — 'anyone can build' energy without being condescending
key_objections_addressed: Too technical to build an app — addressed by chat-first interface
Prototypes aren't real — addressed by 'working prototype' and deploy language
Not sure where to start — addressed by templates and placeholder prompt
missing_or_weak: No testimonials or customer quotes visible in page text
Logo bar referenced but specific company names not displayed (weak social proof extraction)
No explicit pricing on homepage — creates friction for self-serve buyers
Metrics appear to be animated counters starting at 0, which may read as empty on first render
No clear differentiation from Bolt.new, Replit, or Cursor in the copy
No case studies or success stories visible
standout_elements: Prompt input as the hero CTA is extremely high-conviction — product is the pitch
Three-step 'Start → Watch → Refine → Ship' flow is clear and low-friction
Role-based targeting in footer (Founders, PMs, Designers, Marketers, Sales, Ops) signals broad ICP awareness
Template gallery lowers the blank-canvas anxiety and drives discovery
Mobile app availability differentiates from most web-only competitors
